nasb.text: This One will be our peace. When the Assyrian invades our land, When he tramples on our citadels, Then we will raise against him Seven shepherds and eight leaders of men.

esv.text: And he shall be their peace. When the Assyrian comes into our land and treads in our palaces, then we will raise against him seven shepherds and eight princes of men;

cnv.text: 這就是那帶來太平的。 亞述人入侵我們的國土， 踐踏我們宮殿的時候， 我們就要興起七個牧者； 八個作領袖的人攻擊他。

ccb.text: 祂必给他们带来平安！ 亚述人侵略我们的国土、践踏我们的宫殿时， 我们将选立七位牧者和八位首领抗击他们。
